description: Description:This feature is about the logout functionality of the application

steps.name: Given the user is logged into the application with valid "testlogin@gmail.com" and "testlogin"
And the user is on the My Account page
When the user clicks on Logout link
Then the user should receive an intimation "Account Logout" regarding logout
